title: Oscar Winners 2026 Final Predictions & Critic Picks
text: This Hollywood Reporter feature provides side-by-side analysis from two industry experts ahead of the 98th Annual Academy Awards. For Best Director: Will Win: Paul Thomas Anderson for "One Battle After Another" - Awards expert Scott Feinberg notes that Anderson has "been around longer" and "racked up 14 Oscar noms without a win." Additionally, PTA swept major precursor awards including the Directors Guild Award, which historically predicts the Oscar winner with high accuracy. Should Win: Ryan Coogler for "Sinners" - Chief film critic David Rooney argues that both Anderson and Coogler "delivered bold, original works with a lot on their minds." However, Rooney favors Coogler's direction, citing how "Sinners" features "expertly crafted narrative and thematic layers."
